mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_attempt (user_id, score, total_questions, correct_count, duration_seconds) VALUES (#{userId}, #{score}, #{totalQuestions}, #{correctCount}, #{durationSeconds})
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.nickname, MAX(a.score) AS bestScore, COUNT(a.id) AS attemptCount FROM quiz_attempt a JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = a.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.nickname ORDER BY bestScore DESC, attemptCount ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalAttempts, AVG(score) AS avgScore, AVG(correct_count * 1.0 / NULLIF(total_questions, 0)) AS avgCorrectRate, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS distinctUsers FROM quiz_attempt

SELECT a.id, a.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, a.score, a.total_questions AS totalQuestions, a.correct_count AS correctCount, a.duration_seconds AS durationSeconds, a.created_at AS createdAt FROM quiz_attempt a JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = a.user_id ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
